title: elymus × hansenii
intro: Elymus × hansenii, also known as Hansen's wheat grass, is a hybrid grass species that belongs to the Poaceae family. It is prized for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions such as digestive issues and skin problems. The health benefits of Elymus × hansenii include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce stress and anxiety, and promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, Elymus × hansenii is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
